name: Do I get paid while off work for shoulder injury from job in Taylorsville?
description: Yes, ~67% wages for time off per doctor orders.[2]

mainEntity.name: Do I get paid while off work for shoulder injury from job in Taylorsville?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, ~67% wages for time off per doctor orders.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah workers' comp pays about 66 2/3% of average weekly wage for temporary total disability.[2] Up to state max.[2] Key factors: must be off due to doctor restrictions; employer verifies; permanent pays longer.[2] Submit wage stubs, follow treatment, lawyer ensures full payments without gaps.[3] Covers essentials during recovery.
